emergency_definition: Emergency if no power, burning smell, or sparking panel.
Emergency routing: call technician line 214-555-0133 first, then manager 214-555-0134.
Non-emergency work orders are collected and reviewed same day when possible.

emergency_routing_rules.fallback: Emergency if no power, burning smell, or sparking panel.

non_emergency_routing_rules.routing_summary: Non-emergency work orders are collected and reviewed same day when possible.

call_transfer_rules.transfer_fail_message: If nobody answers, tell caller we will return the call quickly.

after_hours_flow_summary: After hours, the agent confirms emergency status immediately. For emergencies, it captures name, number, and address before transfer. For non-emergencies, it logs details and confirms next-business-hours follow-up.
office_hours_flow_summary: During office hours (Monday-Friday 07:30 AM-06:00 PM CST), the agent greets the caller, collects purpose/name/number, and routes according to emergency rules.
